examples: The audience got up and applauded

meanings.definition: refuse to back down; remain solid under criticism or attack

examples: Can you stand the bookshelf up?
We had to stand for the entire performance!
He stood up for his friend
She stuck up for the teacher who was accused of harassing the student

meanings.definition: resist or withstand wear, criticism, etc.

examples: It was a sight to make one's hair uprise!
